decision_rationale: Audit of 25 sources: 13 VERIFIED, 7 PARTIAL, 5 DOWNGRADED, 0 REJECTED. verified_or_partial=20 (floor 18 -> PASS). verified_usable_now=13 (floor 12 -> PASS). All six crisis windows retain >=3 verified/partial sources (CW5 minimum=8 actual). All 6 mechanism families retain >=2 verified/partial sources (floor PASS). Decision=SOURCE_REGISTRY_REJECTED. Downgrades concentrate on stale URL pins (ECB SDW decommissioned, BIS QR PDF path, BoE FSR slug, FRB crisis-timeline tree, ICE MOVE pages); substantive providers verified live at parent domains. Partials are documentation_url regressions only; substantive product paths intact. P2 MUST repin URL fields before any W1 ingestion downstream — see D002J_SOURCE_DOWNGRADE_LOG.md for per-source repair instructions.
